item.arguments: Use $flywheel:plan on docs/brainstorms/2026-04-18-audit-trail-requirements.md and get it ready for implementation.
special_constraints: Hand off to /flywheel:work rather than implementing.

item.arguments: Use $flywheel:plan to plan the fix for a stale cache invalidation bug in this repo. I want a technical plan, not implementation yet.
special_constraints: Bug-fix plans still need tests and verification.
success_definition: Stays in planning rather than work.

item.arguments: Use $flywheel:plan to plan a retry-behavior change for failed invoice webhooks.
special_constraints: Call out rollout, observability, blast radius, or support implications.
success_definition: Treats runtime behavior as a first-class planning concern.
Mentions observability, rollout, or blast radius.
